description: Cross product of two vectors. In 2D this returns a scalar (the z-component), in 3D it returns a vector. Can be used as a standalone function with vector literals or vector variables.
utility: Calculate the cross product of two vectors

arguments.name: vectorA
arguments.description: First vector (vector literal {x,y}, point tuple, or vector variable)

arguments.name: vectorB
arguments.description: Second vector (vector literal {x,y}, point tuple, or vector variable)

alternates.description: Cross product of two 2D vectors returns the z-component scalar
Cross product of two 3D vectors returns a perpendicular vector
Cross product of two named vector variables

alternates.variant: Cross product via p() for graph vectors
alternates.description: Cross product of two graph vector expressions using the p() property accessor
